message:
✨ feat: add trash icon on tabs to terminate tmux sessions (#95)

- Adds a 🗑 trash button directly on each tab that has a tmux session
- X button = disconnect only (tmux keeps running)
- Trash button = disconnect AND terminate the underlying tmux session
- Trash button calls DELETE /api/tmux-sessions/:name then closes tab

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
